action_set_definitions.name: search_catalog
action_set_definitions.description: Searches the library catalog for books matching a title and location. Returns a list of matching book objects including their unique IDs.

title.description: The title or partial title of the book.

location.description: The physical location in the library (e.g., 'Section B, Shelf 4').

action_set_definitions.name: get_user_info
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current profile of a library patron, including their active reservation list and account status.

user_id.description: The unique identifier for the library patron.

action_set_definitions.name: cancel_reservation
action_set_definitions.description: Cancels an existing book reservation for a specific user to free up account capacity.

book_id.description: The unique ID of the book to be removed from the user's reservations.

action_set_definitions.name: reserve_book
action_set_definitions.description: Creates a new reservation for a book. Fails if the user exceeds the system limit of 2 active reservations.

book_id.description: The unique ID of the book to reserve.

state_description.catalog: List of books available in the library database
state_description.user_database: Registered library users and their current activity
state_description.system_timestamp: Current simulated date and time in the environment
